title: amsinckia menziesii var. intermedia
intro: Amsinckia menziesii var. intermedia, commonly known as Menzies' fiddleneck or Western fiddleneck, is a biennial or perennial herb belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amsinckia menziesii var. intermedia are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
